---
title: "MSc Transport Planning and the Environment"
---

This repository contains the executive summaries and analysis of some modules from the MSc Transport Planning and the Environment at the University of Leeds.

# Curriculum Vitae

[English version (.pdf)](cv/cv_German_EN.pdf) | [Versión en español (.pdf)](cv/cv_German_ES.pdf)

#  Module Index

## Transport Data Science

[Cambridge 20-Minute City Accessibility Analysis](data-science/tds.html)

## Sustainable Spatial Planning and Analysis

[Bikeability Index of Lima](spatial-analysis/sspa.html)

## Shaping Future Transport Systems

[Shared Micromobility: Challenges and Opportunities](shaping/shaping.html)

## Air Quality Policy Design and Evaluation

[Air Quality Analysis in Edinburgh](air-quality/AQ.html)
